question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list any main sections or chapters of the thesis. It only provides a problem statement and context, so the reader cannot identify the thesis structure from this passage.

question: Description
feedback: There is no brief description of the contents of each section. The passage merely describes the problem and the proposed solution, without outlining what each part of the thesis will cover.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis is not evident from this text. It lacks an outline or roadmap that would help a reader understand how the work is organized.
